Name: War Sickle
Description: A sickle made for war. It has a hand guard and everything.

Name: Battle Sickle
Description: A sickle made for battle, which is legally distinct to war. It has vex instead of nick.

Name: Occult Longblade Scythe
Description: A long bladed scythe covered in arcane symbols and a skull near the base of the blade.

Name: Mallet of the Harlequin
Description: A comically large mallet with a smiley face and colorful decorations that exudes faint demonic energy.

Name: Moon-Touched Weapon
Description: In Darkness, the unsheathed metal of this weapon sheds moonlight, creating Bright Light in a 15-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 15 feet.

Name: Silvered Weapon
Description: An alchemical process has bonded silver to this magic weapon. When you score a Critical Hit with it against a creature that is shape-shifted, the weapon deals one additional die of damage.

Name: Returning Weapon
Description: This magic weapon returns to your hand immediately after you use it to make a ranged attack roll.

Name: Ammunition +1 (10)
Description: You have a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this piece of magic ammunition. Once it hits a target, the ammunition is no longer magical.

Name: Returning Weapon +1
Description: This magic weapon grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it, and it returns to your hand immediately after you use it to make a ranged attack roll.

Name: Weapon +1
Description: You have a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this weapon
